title: CSIR IICB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 08 Multi Tasking Staff Posts
description: CSIR-Indian Institute of Chemical Biology (CSIR-IICB) has officially released a notification for 2026. Allotted 08 vacancies for Multi-Tasking Staff Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass and 12th can grab this chance and apply for the CSIR IICB Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online on or before the app...
